featureFlag.enableRequires: explicit user approval plus runner implementation

purpose: Define how a future local LLM DOE automation should inspect multiple repos overnight and produce morning recommendations.

runnerStatus.reason: Hold until the user explicitly approves the actual nightly runner.

repoDescriptorFormat.name: string
repoDescriptorFormat.track: agent-artifact-quality | code-quality | security-simulation | ui-improvement | product-update-tailoring | customer-specific-update

allowedDefaultActions: write morning recommendation packet in agent-builder output folder

rules: Do not infer a trend from one run.
Change at most four factors per nightly DOE.
Keep prompts short and artifact-specific for smaller local models.
Treat low-confidence findings as repeat prompts.
Escalate security findings to a stronger reviewer before action.
